titles.en: The meaning of what has been narrated with regards to that the one who rides a riding animal, then falls from it and dies, that he will enter the Fire
The meaning of what has been narrated with regards to that the one who rides a riding animal, then falls from it and dies, that he will enter the Fire

segments: . حدثنا محمد بن يحيى العطار، عن محمد بن الحسين بن أبي الخطاب، عن محمد بن سنان، عن المفضل بن عمر، عن أبي عبد الله عليه السلام قال: من ركب زاملة ثم وقع منها فمات دخل النار.
arabic.text: . حدثنا محمد بن يحيى العطار، عن محمد بن الحسين بن أبي الخطاب، عن محمد بن سنان، عن المفضل بن عمر، عن أبي عبد الله عليه السلام قال: من ركب زاملة ثم وقع منها فمات دخل النار.

segments: 1.	We were told by Muhammed bin Musa bin Mutawakkil, may Allah be pleased with him, that he said: We were told by Muhammed bin Yahya al-‘Attar, from Muhammed bin Hussain bin Abi’l-Khattab, from Muhammed bin Sinan, from Mufaddal bin Umar, from Abu Abdillah, peace be upon him, that he said: The one who rides a riding animal, then falls from it and dies, will enter the Fire.
en.basel-kadem.text: 1.	We were told by Muhammed bin Musa bin Mutawakkil, may Allah be pleased with him, that he said: We were told by Muhammed bin Yahya al-‘Attar, from Muhammed bin Hussain bin Abi’l-Khattab, from Muhammed bin Sinan, from Mufaddal bin Umar, from Abu Abdillah, peace be upon him, that he said: The one who rides a riding animal, then falls from it and dies, will enter the Fire.

narratorChain.raw: حدثنا محمد بن موسى بن المتوكل - رضي الله عنه - قال

parts.text: محمد بن موسى بن المتوكل - رضي الله عنه - قال
